title: Netflix Phishing Text
description: I got a text saying my Netflix billing failed and to click a link. The URL looked like net-flix-billing-update.info.
action_steps: Do not click the link or reply to the text.
Log into Netflix directly through your browser or official app.
Block the sender and report as spam.

title: Loud music at 2am
description: Can someone tell the frat house on 5th street to keep it down? It is Tuesday night.

title: Package Thieves Following Delivery Truck
description: A silver sedan with out-of-state plates is trailing an Amazon truck down Elm Street. They just grabbed a box.

title: Fake Microsoft Support Caller
description: Someone with a heavy accent called my elderly mother claiming they need to install remote software to fix a virus on her PC. Thankfully she hung up.
action_steps: Microsoft will never proactively call you about a PC issue.
Never install AnyDesk, TeamViewer, or other remote tools if instructed by an unsolicited caller.
If you suspect access was given, disconnect the internet and run a malware scan.

title: Missing Orange Tabby Cat
description: My mostly orange cat Barnaby got out tonight. Hes wearing a blue collar.

title: Car break-ins on 12th Ave
description: Three cars had their windows smashed overnight on 12th avenue. Make sure you arent leaving valuables visible.
